heading: Indexes
body:
The `data` collection contains the following indexes:

| Name                  | Index                          | Description                                                        | Properties |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------- |
| \_id\_                | \{ "\_id": 1 }                 | Primary key index on the \_id field.                               |            |
| coordinates\_2dsphere | \{ "coordinates": "2dsphere" } | Geospatial 2dsphere index on the coordinates GeoJSON format field. | Sparse     |
